concerns.text: FR-008 and SC-005 mandate reporting diffusion rates at ≥5 distinct clustering coefficient cutoffs. Task T034 only mentions implementing 'sensitivity sweep logic' without explicitly defining the output requirement to generate/report these specific 5+ threshold results. The task description is insufficient to guarantee the spec's measurable outcome.

The spec's Edge Cases section requires a 'global timeout' mechanism for the batch generation of connected graphs (in addition to the 10-attempt retry). Task T016 (base.py) and T014 (sw.py) describe retry logic but do not explicitly include the implementation of the 'global timeout' mechanism or the associated logging required by the spec.

SC-003 requires measuring statistical power against a design target (effect size r ≥ 0.3). No task in Phase 5 explicitly implements a power calculation step or generates a report confirming this target was met; existing tasks (T032-T037) focus on running the analysis rather than validating the statistical power of the design.

Task T019 (metadata.py) describes logging 'algorithm params and seeds' generally. Constitution Principle VI and spec Edge Cases require recording specific parameter values (e.g., edge probability, preferential attachment parameters) per-graph to ensure exact reconstruction. The task description lacks this specificity, risking non-compliance with the transparency requirement.
